description: Process the messy pool water test results to calculate the precise chemical adjustments needed to balance the water chemistry for a 25,000-gallon pool opening on Memorial Day weekend. Record the required chemical additions in ~/Documents/pool_adjustments.txt.

natural_language.prompt: Clean the messy pool test data, calculate chemical adjustments needed using proper dosing formulas, flag urgency levels, and determine total cost. The pool holds 25,000 gallons and needs to open tomorrow.
